changeSet.author: ahri-workflow-rbac
changeSet.comment: Backfill missing workflow_type for legacy Genomics & Bioinformatics and Virology notebooks

update.where: (workflow_type IS NULL OR workflow_type = '' OR workflow_type = 'gbd') AND ( title = 'Genomics & Bioinformatics Laboratory' OR title LIKE 'Genomics & Bioinformatics Laboratory - Lab %' )
(workflow_type IS NULL OR workflow_type = '') AND ( title = 'Virology Laboratory' OR title LIKE 'Virology Laboratory - Lab %' )
